raw_consumer_statement:
I booked a hotel and car rental from XXXX from a trip to XXXX XXXX. I fell ill the day before so I called the hotel to cancel. The hotel said to call XXXX, when called XXXX, XXXX said they would need to call the Hotel Manager to get the charges reversed to verify I did not show. 

Its been 3.5 weeks and every time I email XXXX for an update they are still stating after 3.5 weeks they have yet to hear from the hotel manager and this nothing but a tactic used to not have to pay back the consumer. 

I let my credit card company know and they said I need to go through XXXX, so my credit card company is not advocating for me when they are supposed to & It states clearly on the hotel website when you confirm on XXXX that as long as you do a no call no show you would be reimbursed.
